data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that a failed item triggers a work order or equipment lockout. The evidence provided in the linked use case does demonstrate that a failed inspection on the forklift leads to a lockout and the creation of a maintenance ticket. However, it does not provide comprehensive evidence that this behavior is consistently applied across all relevant equipment types or scenarios, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming that the lockout and work order creation behavior applies to all equipment types, not just forklifts.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for all equipment types
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that failed inspections for all equipment types trigger appropriate lockout and work order creation.
